properties.name: ai.service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the Python FastAPI AI screening service.

properties.name: storage.type
properties.description: Storage backend for uploaded resumes. Options: local (./uploads/screening/) or s3.

properties.name: aws.s3.bucket
properties.description: AWS S3 bucket name for resume storage. Used when storage.type=s3.

properties.name: aws.s3.region
properties.description: AWS region for the S3 bucket. Used when storage.type=s3.

properties.name: aws.s3.access-key
properties.description: AWS access key ID for S3. Used when storage.type=s3.

properties.name: aws.s3.secret-key
properties.description: AWS secret access key for S3. Used when storage.type=s3.

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.
